privileged_info_summary: The task basic_formulas@1 uses synthetic data (the values 10, 20, 30, 40, 50 are hardcoded task requirements, not from external sources). All mathematical claims are verified correct: SUM(10,20,30,40,50) = 150 and AVERAGE(10,20,30,40,50) = 30. The environment version (libreoffice_calc_env@0.1) matches the specified env_id. The verifier correctly checks four criteria: (1) cell values A1-A5, (2) SUM formula in B1 with result 150, (3) AVERAGE formula in B2 with result 30, and (4) presence of formulas (not hardcoded). The pass threshold of 75% (3/4 criteria) is correctly implemented. Task timeout (120 seconds), max steps (10), and difficulty rating (easy) are all reasonable for this basic spreadsheet task.
